'''Strok''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer in the staff of [[High General]] [[Touno]] in the southern district of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Svivren]]. A [[Color/Legends|blond]]-[[Hair/Legends|haired]] blue-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] male, he was also a spy for both [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] and [[Black Nebula (organization)|Black Nebula]]. When [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] led a [[Battle of Svivren|raid on Svivren]] in an attempt to capture Black Nebula leader, [[Dequc]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Strok passed on the information to Dequc so he could replace himself with an impostor. During the raid Strok faked his own death, going to [[Nezmi]] with Dequc.

It was there, in the Nebula headquarters within the [[Bubble Cliffs]], that he was [[Mission to Qiaxx|killed]] by Jade after they both recognized each other.
